body.title: Homeostatic setpoints — arousal and valence decay toward resting state, not zero
body.result: Already fully implemented in milieu.py. HOMEOSTATIC_VALENCE_SETPOINT=0.1, HOMEOSTATIC_AROUSAL_SETPOINT=0.05 (env-configurable). Decay formula: s.dim = s.dim * DECAY_DIM + SETPOINT * (1 - DECAY_DIM) — decays toward resting state not zero. Boredom mechanism live.
body.description: D277 gap. Biological pattern: the brain has homeostatic setpoints. Cortisol, arousal, mood all have resting states they return to — not zero. Igor implementation: add HOMEOSTATIC_AROUSAL_SETPOINT=0.3 and HOMEOSTATIC_VALENCE_SETPOINT=0.1 to milieu config. In NE._decay_step() (or milieu.tick()), replace pure multiplicative decay: `arousal *= decay` → `arousal = arousal + (setpoint - arousal) * gain`. Same for valence. gain = 1 - decay (so equilibrium = setpoint). Effect: Igor at rest sits at arousal 0.3 (mildly alert) not 0.0 (comatose). Valence drifts toward +0.1 (mild positive affect) not 0 (flat). PROC_BOREDOM_TRIGGER threshold may need recalibration after this change. Files: cognition/milieu.py or narrative_engine.py decay section. Inertia: MEDIUM. Tests: verify arousal converges to setpoint after many ticks.
